response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed video to identify two song segments. 2. Identified 'Dahlia' and 'Upboomboom' via on-screen text. 3. Used web search to confirm song titles, original composers ('Dahlia': Chanmina, 'Upboomboom': Giga & TeddyLoid), and find full original/English lyrics. 4. Created scene segments based on performance start/end times and transition points. 5. Formatted lyrics for JSON compliance.
response.global_summary: A high-energy 3D live performance video featuring two distinct vocal performances ('Dahlia' and 'Upboomboom') by a virtual artist, punctuated by a brief transition and ending with an outro featuring a stage prop.

scenes.description: The video begins with the song 'Dahlia'. The character performs the song on stage with dramatic lighting.

once upon a time
there was a little girl
she really looked like you
oh darling, she was just like you
she was just like a tiger's eye
she found herself a dream, more precious than any kind of greed
and she made it hers
one night it was raining
dewy eyes saw a blurry sight
it was beautiful like a lie
a dahlia, smiling at her
i want the same one
i want the same one
that's what i want, she spat out and said
what do you want in return?
now go on and play that hymn
a melody of ignorance is a high
if all you want is my heart, i'd love to give it away
and then i
what a sickly sweet wish
and then she just like a dahlia
no, dahlia
that girl
she's not beautiful
just her voice
i'm a sinner
when i think back
no one even heard me sing
ah i don't give a shit
oh she don't give a shit
yeah, who's to blame? oh, you? you? you?
oh, honey, it's important to live
to choose life over being chosen

you're gonna want to throw it all away
ya see, now you know

oh and then i

no, dahlia

scenes.description: The music pauses, and there is a brief transition and talk.
The second song 'Upboomboom' begins, with the performer engaging in high-energy choreography.
